'''âz-th-ng-j''' ('''kazathngejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modalize|modalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modalize|modalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-th-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazathngejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
